description: Zuplo is a managed API gateway platform for building, securing, deploying, and observing APIs. It also supports MCP server and MCP gateway patterns so teams can expose APIs and AI tools through the same gateway infrastructure.
summary: Zuplo exposes a documented Developer API at `https://dev.zuplo.com`, an npm-installed `zuplo` CLI plus public `create-zuplo-api` scaffolder, and tenant-defined MCP endpoints on deployed gateways using OAuth-protected bearer access.
